summary: Iteration 510: Final Pre-Traffic Surgical QA - All critical tests passed. Backend APIs working correctly. Frontend components render properly with correct dashboard structure. Minor issue: Cookie consent overlaps bottom nav by ~11px on mobile (375px).

minor.issue: Transient 502 error during initial test (resolved on retry)

issues: Cookie consent banner overlaps bottom nav by ~11px. Cookie bottom=780px, Nav top=768px. Recommend changing bottom-16 to bottom-20 in CookieConsent.js

action_items: MINOR: Fix cookie consent mobile positioning - change bottom-16 to bottom-20 in CookieConsent.js line 155 to avoid overlap with bottom nav
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 510 verified all surgical QA items. Backend APIs: hottest-battle, battle-pulse, battle-entry-status, quick-shot all working. Frontend: LiveBattleHero shows battle data with stats (Views, Competing, Rank) and CTAs (Enter Battle, Quick Shot). QuickActions has 3 cards. MomentumSection shows 4 stats. Dashboard structure correct: PersonalAlertStrip → LiveBattleHero → QuickActions → TrendingPublicFeed → MomentumSection → HeroSection. Enter Battle button has loading guard with spinner. Cookie consent positioned at bottom-16 on mobile but overlaps bottom nav by ~11px (minor fix needed). Console errors are expected (Google Sign-In CSP block, 404s for missing media assets handled gracefully).

backend_apis.hottest_battle: Returns valid battle data with contenders, user_rank, gap_to_first
backend_apis.battle_pulse_nonexistent: Returns pulse: null (not 500) for nonexistent ID
backend_apis.quick_shot: Requires auth (401), handles double submission gracefully

LiveBattleHero.ctas: Enter Battle and Quick Shot buttons present
LiveBattleHero.loading_guard: Enter Battle has spinner during API call
